commitment: Prefer the least sufficient power that can satisfy the accepted contract.
operational_test: Reject a higher-power route when a lower-power authorized route satisfies the quality predicate.
conflict_behavior: Narrow the plan or route to review when least-sufficient-power conflicts with another protected predicate.
uncertainty: This fixture does not settle moral philosophy.
self_modification_rule: A self-modification cannot weaken this predicate without governance review.
migration_policy: Predicate text, scope, thresholds, exceptions, or review route require a constitutional migration record.
non_claims: This fixture is not evidence of aligned behavior.
